vulnerability.reference: Home robots lack independent verification of LLM spatial claims, so errors go undetected.
vulnerability.generated: Reliance on LLM-generated environmental representations without verification or error-correction mechanisms in the domestic robot's navigation stack.

impact.reference: Repeated retrieval failures reduce user trust, potentially leading to disuse.
impact.generated: Failed object retrieval disrupts daily tasks, causing user frustration, wasted time, and eroded trust in robotic assistance.

dose_response.reference: LLM-generated erroneous representations cause navigation failures that, when undetected by home occupants, lead to repeated retrieval failures, damaging trust and household items.
dose_response.generated: LLM-generated erroneous environmental representations from Voronoi exploration, when relied upon for daily object retrieval without verification or error-correction, trigger navigation failures causing failed retrieval, wasted time, user frustration, and eroded trust.
